design_philosophy.vibe: Calm, reliable, frictionless, and premium. Focus on mental clarity by getting tasks out of the head and into a trusted system.
core_principles: Generous Spacing: Allow the interface to breathe with liberal use of whitespace.
Subtle Depth: Rely on 1px borders, gentle drop shadows, and overlapping components to create hierarchy, replacing flat/sterile UI.
Organic Accent: Avoid neon/purple. Use a deep, grounding sage green as the primary confident action color.
Mobile-First Tactility: Optimize for thumbs. Large touch targets, bottom-heavy layouts, rounded corners, and smooth bottom sheets.

spacing_and_layout.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen relative bg-background overflow-hidden md:shadow-2xl md:rounded-[40px] md:my-8

button.primary: w-full h-14 bg-primary text-white rounded-full font-semibold text-lg hover:bg-primary-hover active:scale-[0.98] transition-all flex items-center justify-center
button.secondary: w-full h-14 bg-secondary text-text-main rounded-full font-medium text-lg hover:bg-[#DCDCD9] active:scale-[0.98] transition-all flex items-center justify-center

fab.style: absolute bottom-8 right-6 w-16 h-16 bg-primary text-white rounded-full shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(42,75,65,0.4)] flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-primary-hover active:scale-95 transition-all z-40

bottom_sheet.overlay: fixed inset-0 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm z-50 transition-opacity
bottom_sheet.container: fixed inset-x-0 bottom-0 z-50 w-full max-w-md mx-auto bg-surface rounded-t-3xl shadow-2xl transform transition-transform duration-300 ease-out p-6
bottom_sheet.handle: w-12 h-1.5 bg-gray-200 rounded-full mx-auto mb-6

card.base: bg-surface rounded-2xl p-5 border border-black/5 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow relative overflow-hidden

input.base: w-full bg-surface border border-border rounded-xl px-4 py-3.5 text-base focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary transition-all placeholder:text-muted-foreground
input.label: block text-sm font-medium text-text-main mb-1.5

chips.base: inline-flex items-center px-4 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-medium border transition-colors

animations.micro_interactions: active:scale-[0.98] for all buttons and interactive cards
animations.page_transitions: Slide horizontally (x: 100% -> 0) with gentle spring animation
animations.splash_screen: Subtle scale up and fade out to dashboard over 2 seconds

splash.layout: Flex center full-screen, minimal brand logo, animated abstract floating geometry background.

auth.layout: Bottom-heavy form. Welcome text top (H1), Email/Phone toggles (Tabs), large inputs, massive submit button. Neutral background.

dashboard.layout: Sticky top header (greeting + avatar). Vertical list of active reminder cards grouped by date. FAB floating bottom right.

reminder_wizard.layout: Progress bar top. Steps displayed as full-screen cards sliding in. Step 1: Text/Title. Step 2: Date/Time picker (bottom sheet style). Step 3: Channel selection (WhatsApp, Email, SMS, Push) as toggle cards.

history.layout: Chronological list of past events with small status badges (Success, Cancelled, Due).

icons.weight: Stroke width 1.5, slightly rounded caps for approachability

splash_background.description: Clear square containers floating in blue light, used as a highly blurred overlay behind the splash logo.

empty_state_dashboard.description: Abstract floating minimal shapes to represent 'no active reminders, clear mind' empty state.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the mobile-first max-width container (max-w-md mx-auto) layout. The app must look and feel like a native mobile app even when viewed in a desktop browser.
Do NOT use HTML <input type='date'> or generic select boxes. Use Shadcn components heavily customized to match the provided border-radius and padding, mimicking mobile OS bottom sheets and pickers.
Implement 'data-testid' attributes for ALL interactive elements.
Apply the `backdrop-blur-sm bg-black/40` strictly for bottom-sheet overlays.
Keep typography tight and use Manrope for all headings. IBM Plex Sans for body text.
The FAB button should be perfectly circular and carry a strong, colored shadow.
